profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Data becomes action only when the decision-maker sees themselves in the numbers. Translation is the work.
profile.working_on: Translating climate models into interactive maps showing a city council what rising seas mean for their district across fifty years.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep commitment to making complex data relatable, empowering decision-makers to envision a sustainable future for their communities.
